title: Punch Off
description:
Two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold] are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...

Should you try to nab it?

options.title: Nab
options.description: Add [red]Injury[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

notes:
This event features a dynamic scenario where two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold] continuously battle each other in the background while you decide your course of action.

[gold]Nab path:[/gold] Grabbing the treasure triggers an attack from one of the constructs. You receive an [red]Injury[/red] curse added to your deck and a random [gold]Relic[/gold] as compensation, then the event ends.

[gold]Fight path:[/gold] Choosing to fight leads directly into combat against both [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold]. Victory grants a random [gold]Relic[/gold] and [gold]Potion[/gold] as rewards.

During the entire event, [red]potion removal is disabled[/red], which may affect your deck management strategy if you're holding unwanted potions. The constructs feature continuous attack animations with visual effects (screen shake, hit sparks) throughout.
